title: zabelia stenantha
intro: Zabelia stenantha, also known as Korean box or box honeysuckle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae, native to East Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zabelia stenantha include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
